name: fixtures: each positive/negative folder contains a self-contained <file>.{js,mjs,ts} with no cross-folder imports (hermetic)
command: for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/node"/*/positive "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/node"/*/negative; do test -d "$d" || continue; cd "$d"; for f in *.js *.mjs *.ts; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if grep -E "^import.*from \"\.\." "$f" >/dev/null; then echo "FAIL $d/$f cross-folder import" 1>&2; exit 1; fi; done; cd - >/dev/null; done; echo ok 1>&2
